name: harness.debug_spawn_monster_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit one debug-spawn monster primitive end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: spawn a harmless squirrel one tile east through the debug monster path, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved-player active_monsters metadata for mon_squirrel at offset [1,0,0]. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_spawn_squirrel_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn monster primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn monster helper returns to the live map after selecting squirrel and confirming the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: one mon_squirrel should exist as an active monster one tile east of the player, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved active_monsters metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved active_monsters mon_squirrel metadata after save makes this debug-spawn row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug-spawn monster primitive unless audit_saved_active_monsters_after_debug_spawn is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_spawn_monster_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug spawn monster and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_spawn_monster
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug-spawn monster save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug-spawn monster step; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_spawn_monster
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved active-monster metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_monster_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_monster_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug-spawn monster save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug-spawn monster save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_active_monsters_after_debug_spawn
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain mon_squirrel at player-relative offset [1,0,0] after same-run debug-spawn save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains mon_squirrel one tile east of the player after the debug-spawn monster primitive
